content: TASK-036 interrupt done: single-icon 2D node labels now anchor at the component center while preserving icon clearance, fixing the visual imbalance in the CDN demo. Browser verification on examples/demo.html confirmed iconed labels have zero delta from node center. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks.
